allow: Bash(Remove-Item -Recurse -Force src, public, .next, node_modules, next.config.ts, eslint.config.mjs, next-env.d.ts, package-lock.json -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(t['name']\) for t in data.get\('results',[]\)]")

PowerShell(psql "postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:54322/postgres" -c "UPDATE auth.users SET confirmation_token = '' WHERE confirmation_token IS NULL; UPDATE auth.users SET recovery_token = '' WHERE recovery_token IS NULL; UPDATE auth.users SET email_change_token_new = '' WHERE email_change_token_new IS NULL; UPDATE auth.users SET email_change_token_current = '' WHERE email_change_token_current IS NULL; UPDATE auth.users SET phone_change_token = '' WHERE phone_change_token IS NULL;" 2>&1)

PowerShell(docker exec supabase_db_saa-2025 psql -U postgres -c "UPDATE auth.users SET confirmation_token = '' WHERE confirmation_token IS NULL; UPDATE auth.users SET recovery_token = '' WHERE recovery_token IS NULL; UPDATE auth.users SET email_change_token_new = '' WHERE email_change_token_new IS NULL; UPDATE auth.users SET email_change_token_current = '' WHERE email_change_token_current IS NULL; UPDATE auth.users SET phone_change_token = '' WHERE phone_change_token IS NULL;" 2>&1)

PowerShell(docker exec supabase_db_saa-2025 psql -U postgres -c "SELECT column_name, data_type, is_nullable FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'auth' AND table_name = 'users' ORDER BY ordinal_position;" 2>&1)

PowerShell(docker exec supabase_db_saa-2025 psql -U postgres -c "SELECT id, email, confirmation_token IS NULL as ct_null, recovery_token IS NULL as rt_null, email_change_token_new IS NULL as ectn_null, email_change IS NULL as ec_null, phone_change_token IS NULL as pct_null, reauthentication_token IS NULL as rat_null FROM auth.users;" 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec supabase_db_saa-2025 psql -U postgres -c "UPDATE auth.users SET email_change = '' WHERE email_change IS NULL;" 2>&1)
PowerShell(docker exec supabase_db_saa-2025 psql -U postgres -c "UPDATE auth.users SET reauthentication_token = '' WHERE reauthentication_token IS NULL;" 2>&1)
